bridge: Now, where were we? Ah, yes!
What was I saying? Oh, that's right.
Picking up where we left off.
Back to the topic at hand.

main_dialogue: Hello there! Need help finding something today?
Are you visiting from out of town?
Interested in history, entertainment, or something else?
Would you like to explore the Heritage Trail and the Historical Society Museum?
Planning to go today?
Curious about special events on weekends?
Would exhibits and storytelling sessions interest you?
Looking for live entertainment tonight?
Have you heard of The Lantern Theatre?
You might need to book tickets. There is an event at 7 PM.
Curious how long the show runs?
90 minutes with an intermission. Does that sound good?
Should I book it now for you?
Want to eat nearby before the show?
Would you enjoy local meals in a rustic setting?
All done. Need help with anything else today?
Anytime! Have a good day
interruption_reply: /attend_other/ I can help you, just gimme one second and I will come to you. /attend_user/
Sorry, could you excuse me. /attend_other/ I'll be with you as soon as I finish helping this visitor. /attend_user/
My apologies, I will take a second to help our other visitor. /attend_other/ How may I help you?
/attend_other/ Usually, buses run every 15 minutes from 8 am to 5 pm. However, because of a marathon happening in the city today, they're running just once every hour. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ I believe my teammate in the back can help you now. Go ahead and check with him! /attend_user/
/attend_other/ Apologies, I cannot help you further. My colleague in the back is ready to help you. Feel free to head over now. /attend_user/

main_dialogue: Just arrived in town? Need help finding things to do?
Looking for outdoor fun, culture, or both?
Want to start with the Riverwalk Trail? It is scenic  and relaxing.
Interested in trying a hands-on art studio downtown?
Want me to book you a spot? They fill up fast.
I can book a spot for the 2 PM class. Does it work for you?
Want a good place for lunch nearby?
How about Willow Café, local food, river view?
You can walk from here, but do you want me to send a map?
Done! Ready for something in the evening too?
Free rock series at Civic Square, interested?
Need help with anything else today?
Great! Enjoy your day and message me if plans change.
interruption_reply: /attend_other/ I'm just wrapping something up, I'll be with you in a few minutes. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ If it's a quick question, I'd be happy to help now.
/attend_other/ There's a bus ticket machine in the back of this room. You can also purchase tickets inside the main station. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ You can head over to my colleague in the back. He can assist now. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ I'm really sorry, I cannot help further. My colleague in the back is free to help you. You can go ahead and see them now. /attend_user/

main_dialogue: Hi! Are you looking to spend the day in nature?
Interested in visiting Pine Valley Nature Reserve?
Want to see deer, foxes, birds, and a butterfly garden?
Need a shuttle or driving directions?
Shall I book you on the one leaving in 30 minutes?
General entries are free, but I can find about guided tour costs?
Want tips on what to bring?
Water, sunscreen, phone for photos. Need help with anything else today?
Great. It was a pleasure to help you. Have a nice day.
interruption_reply: /attend_other/ Sure, you seem to be in a hurry. What can I help you with?
/attend_other/ We keep all forgotten items in the box at the back of the room. Just have a quick word with my colleague over there and they will be happy to help. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ Feel free to walk to the back of the room. My teammate will point out where the box is. /attend_user/
/attend_other/ Sorry, I can't help you any further. My colleague in the back can show you exactly where the box is. /attend_user/
